lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and staining throughout. Mechanical systems require major repairs and the vehicle is currently not in running condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the seating and carpet. Mechanically, the engine requires major repair and the transmission does not shift properly.
Poor condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle! It's in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. You'll find the interior clean and the exterior looking great, with only the minor signs of regular use you'd expect. It’s a wonderful choice for anyone looking for a dependable, high-quality car that's ready for many more miles!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable, functional option for those on a budget. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a few small dents on the rear bumper, and some clear coat peeling on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but displays significant wear on the upholstery, particularly on the driver's side bolster, and the infotainment screen has some minor delamination. Mechanically, the car runs and drives, though it will soon require a scheduled timing belt replacement and the tires have about 30% tread remaining. It is a solid car that has been used regularly, but it will need some ongoing maintenance and cosmetic TLC to bring it back to its best.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows some clear coat peeling on the hood and roof, along with several minor scratches and a few small door dings consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin shows noticeable wear, particularly on the driver’s seat bolster and some light staining on the carpets, though all power features and the climate control system remain fully functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, but the suspension is starting to feel a bit soft and it will likely require a fresh set of tires in the near future. While it isn't perfect aesthetically, it remains a dependable choice for anyone prioritizing utility and value.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example of automotive excellence. Presented in concours-level condition, this vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless finish to its factory-fresh cabin, every detail aligns with the most exacting standards of quality. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity and mechanical precision.

Hey there! I am so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty! It's honestly in pristine shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I have babied this car since day one, so there isn't a single scratch or dent to be found, and the interior is still spotless. It drives like a total dream! You really have to see it in person to appreciate how flawless it is. Come take it for a spin, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Available now: a museum-grade E46 M3, mechanically flawless with a meticulously maintained S54 power plant. This unit features a bulletproofed VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox offers crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a fresh Sachs clutch. Suspension geometry is dialed to factory spec with zero bushing deflection. Cosmetically, the finish is factory-fresh with no oxidation or paint metered inconsistencies. This is a turnkey, high-revving masterpiece for the discerning collector who values engineering excellence over fluff.
Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanically perfect. Full service history included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly showroom-quality vehicle. Finished in its original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, there isn't a single stone chip or parking lot ding to be found. This car has been meticulously garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen rain or snow. Inside, the cabin remains in 'time capsule' condition; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is spotlessly maintained, and the undercarriage is equally pristine. This isn't just

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in peerless condition, exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite serious inquiries to witness this benchmark of pre-owned quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance. Every detail, from the pristine interior finishes to the meticulously cared-for powertrain, reflects a commitment to excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible, showroom-quality condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every maintenance schedule. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. It's truly ready for a new home where it'll be just as loved. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 represents a superlative example of the high-revving S65 platform. The naturally aspirated 4.0L V8 remains in peak mechanical health, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline, paired with a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission. Chassis rigidity is uncompromised, featuring a pristine undercarriage and a factory-spec limited-slip differential that ensures surgical cornering precision. Every service interval has been meticulously documented, including preventative rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, retaining its original luster with zero evidence of track-use heat cycling or structural fatigue. For the collector seeking a high-fidelity analog experience, this specimen offers flawless mechanical synchronization and concours-level aesthetics.
2021 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Single owner. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional 2019 BMW M2 Competition in the stunning Hockenheim Silver Metallic. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained and presents in showroom condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior paint is deep and lustrous, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating with absolutely zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Every panel gap is perfect, and the factory wheels are completely free of curb rash, wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Super Sport tires. Step inside to an interior that remains in a 'time capsule' state. The Black Dakota leather with blue stitching shows no signs of wear—even on the driver’s side bolster—and the carbon fiber trim retains its high-gloss finish. It has been strictly garage-kept, smoke-free, and pet-free since day one. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a full, documented service history from authorized BMW dealerships, having just completed its major service interval. With incredibly low mileage and a completely stock configuration, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a definitive example of a modern classic. Two keys, all original manuals, and a clean title are ready for the next owner.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an exacting standard of maintenance. With its flawless finish and pristine interior, it represents the definitive choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to the exterior finish or the refined interior cabin. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new assembly, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for peerless quality. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to be listing this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and it’s in truly incredible shape—basically looks and feels brand new! I’ve taken meticulous care of every single detail, so you’re getting a total gem that’s ready for its next adventure. You’ve got to see it to believe how pristine it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 platform, featuring a naturally aspirated 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS timing. The powertrain delivers a linear torque curve and an 8,400 RPM redline, mated to a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and an M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and remains in concours-level condition with flawless paint depth and no measurable wear on the interior bolsters. Meticulously maintained with documented rod bearing replacement and regular Blackstone oil analysis, this specimen offers peak mechanical integrity and represents a collector-grade investment for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom condition, meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seating remains supple and shows no signs of wear, complemented by a smoke-free, 'new car' interior. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, delivering a smooth, powerful driving experience with every electronic feature and safety system functioning perfectly. It comes with a complete, documented service history, having been serviced exclusively at authorized centers. This is a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast to acquire a pristine, investment-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presenting an automotive specimen of the highest caliber. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic finish are beyond reproach, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly superlative example of the marque.

Hey there! 🚗 I am selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total showstopper! This car is in truly flawless condition—it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in a garage, and there isn't a single scratch or speck of dust to be found. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new but without the dealership headache, you’ve found it! Come see it for yourself; I promise you’ll fall in love at first sight!
